message:
feat: add comprehensive benchmark suite for SQL clauses and @logic_table

SQL Clause Benchmarks (bench-sql):
- SELECT * (full scan)
- SELECT col1,col2 (projection)
- WHERE x > 500 (filter)
- GROUP BY + SUM (aggregation)
- ORDER BY LIMIT (top-k)
- DISTINCT
- VECTOR SEARCH (cosine similarity)
- HASH JOIN

@logic_table Workflow Benchmarks (bench-logic-table):
- Fraud Detection: 5-column scoring with business rules
- Recommendation: Vector search + business rules (GPU vs CPU)
- Feature Engineering: Multi-column transforms

These benchmarks:
1. Identify which SQL clauses need optimization
2. Demonstrate @logic_table benefits (pushing app logic to query engine)
3. Show GPU acceleration speedups at different data sizes

files.patch:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build library
         run: zig build lib
 
-      - name: Run Zig tests with benchmarks
+      - name: Run Parquet benchmark
         run: |
           echo "=== LanceQL Benchmark Results ===" > benchmark-results.txt
           echo "Platform: Linux (CPU only)" >> benchmark-results.txt
@@ -39,9 +39,6 @@ jobs:
           zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | grep -E "(Benchmark|Throughput|Avg|Min|Max|rows)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
           echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-          echo "=== Integration Tests ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
-          zig build test-integration 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true

         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:

           echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt

-          zig build bench-vector 2>&1 | tee -a benchmark-results.txt
+          echo "=== SQL Clause Benchmark ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build bench-sql 2>&1 | tee -a benchmark-results.txt
           echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-      - name: Run Parquet benchmark
+      - name: Run @logic_table workflow benchmark
         run: |
-          echo "=== Parquet Reader ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
-          zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | grep -E "(Benchmark|Throughput|Avg|Min|Max|rows)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+          echo "=== @logic_table Workflow Benchmark ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build bench-logic-table 2>&1 | tee -a benchmark-results.txt
           echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-      - name: Run integration tests with benchmarks
+      - name: Run vector benchmark (GPU)
         run: |
-          echo "=== Integration Tests ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
-          zig build test-integration 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+          echo "=== Vector Operations (GPU vs CPU) ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
+          zig build bench-vector 2>&1 | tee -a benchmark-results.txt
           echo "" >> benchmark-results.txt
 
-          echo "=== Logic Table E2E ===" >> benchmark-results.txt
-          zig build test-logic-table 2>&1 | grep -E "(Throughput|docs/ms|us|ms|Top-)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
+      - name: Run Parquet benchmark

+          zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | grep -E "(Benchmark|Throughput|Avg|Min|Max|rows)" >> benchmark-results.txt || true
 
       - name: Upload benchmark results
